rationale: The US-Iran deal remains the key event for Poland — Iran casting doubt on Sunday signing introduces uncertainty that keeps energy price outlook volatile.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran casts doubt on timing
top_events.summary: Iran's contradicting of Trump's Sunday signing claim reintroduces uncertainty over a deal that could lower global energy prices. For Poland, still adjusting to post-Russian energy supply, this volatility matters.

top_events.title: Ukraine to keep targeting Russian energy after hitting sea terminal
top_events.summary: Ukraine's continued strikes on Russian energy infrastructure could affect global oil/gas supply dynamics and keep the Russia-Ukraine war economically relevant for Poland's energy market.

top_events.title: Hungary's former PM Orban re-elected party leader despite election loss
top_events.summary: Orban retaining Fidesz leadership keeps Hungary's EU-skeptic and pro-Russia political stance alive, which has indirect implications for EU cohesion on Ukraine policy relevant to Poland.
